name: rakku-backend
description: NestJS backend for Rakku - Digital Police Assistant

scripts.prebuild: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const src = path.resolve('../shared/jurisdiction-data'); const dest = path.resolve('./src/jurisdiction-routing/jurisdiction-data'); if (fs.existsSync(src)) { fs.mkdirSync(dest, { recursive: true }); for (const file of fs.readdirSync(src)) { fs.copyFileSync(path.join(src, file), path.join(dest, file)); } }"
scripts.postbuild: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const src = path.resolve('./src/jurisdiction-routing/jurisdiction-data'); const dest = path.resolve('./dist/jurisdiction-routing/jurisdiction-data'); if (fs.existsSync(src)) { fs.mkdirSync(dest, { recursive: true }); for (const file of fs.readdirSync(src)) { fs.copyFileSync(path.join(src, file), path.join(dest, file)); } }"
